mapper.select: SELECT B.ID, B.COMP_CD, B.BUDGET_CD, B.BUDGET_NM, B.FISCAL_YEAR, B.DEPT_CD, B.ACCT_CD, B.BUDGET_AMT, NVL((SELECT SUM(P.TOT_AMT) FROM PR_REQUEST P WHERE P.BUDGET_CD=B.BUDGET_CD AND P.DEL_YN='N' AND P.STS IN ('REQ','APRV')),0) AS USED_AMT, B.USE_YN, B.REG_ID FROM BG_BUDGET B WHERE B.DEL_YN='N' AND (B.BUDGET_CD LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR B.BUDGET_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND B.FISCAL_YEAR=#{fiscalYear} ORDER BY B.BUDGET_CD

SELECT B.ID, B.COMP_CD, B.BUDGET_CD, B.BUDGET_NM, B.FISCAL_YEAR, B.DEPT_CD, B.ACCT_CD, B.BUDGET_AMT, NVL((SELECT SUM(P.TOT_AMT) FROM PR_REQUEST P WHERE P.BUDGET_CD=B.BUDGET_CD AND P.DEL_YN='N' AND P.STS IN ('REQ','APRV')),0) AS USED_AMT, B.USE_YN, B.REG_ID FROM BG_BUDGET B WHERE B.ID=#{id} AND B.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, BUDGET_CD, BUDGET_NM, FISCAL_YEAR, BUDGET_AMT FROM BG_BUDGET WHERE COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND BUDGET_CD=#{budgetCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BG_BUDGET (COMP_CD, BUDGET_CD, BUDGET_NM, FISCAL_YEAR, DEPT_CD, ACCT_CD, BUDGET_AMT, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{budgetCd}, #{budgetNm}, #{fiscalYear}, #{deptCd}, #{acctCd}, NVL(#{budgetAmt},0), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE BG_BUDGET SET BUDGET_NM=#{budgetNm}, FISCAL_YEAR=#{fiscalYear}, DEPT_CD=#{deptCd}, ACCT_CD=#{acctCd}, BUDGET_AMT=NVL(#{budgetAmt},0), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE BG_BUDGET SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
